subject: LU-17242 libcfs: use sched_show_task() for thread dumping

messages.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1:

Looks good to me.

Patch Set 1:

(1 comment)

centos7: Compile failed


 Job output URL: https://testing.whamcloud.com/gerrit-janitor/47760/results.html

Patch Set 1:

My preference would be to keep libcfs_debug_dumpstack() even if it is currently only a single-line wrapper around sched_show_task(), since this will facilitate future enhancements like dumping held DLM locks, FIDs, etc. for debugging as described in LU-16625 and LU-16375.
Uploaded patch set 2.

Build Failed

Patch Set 2: Code-Review+1

Maybe "dumpstack" is then a poor name for the function, Andreas?  If it is supposed to dump a bunch of stuff...  I'd go with "dump" or "dump_state" or something?  Stack to me implies the stack trace (or I guess like all of the stack memory, which of course ... anyway)

> Maybe "dumpstack" is then a poor name for the function, Andreas? 
 > If it is supposed to dump a bunch of stuff...  I'd go with "dump"
 > or "dump_state" or something?  Stack to me implies the stack trace
 > (or I guess like all of the stack memory, which of course ...

There is also the "debug" part of the function name, which should cover the other parts of what is being shown. :-)

We would want to revert https://review.whamcloud.com/53625 ("LU-17242 debug: use dump_stack() where possible") to restore all of the libcfs_debug_dumpstack() callers.

We'd want a partial revert. I was thinking of either doing that in this patch or pushing another top. This patch has to wait for RHEL7 to be dropped anyway, since it doesn't seem like the needed symbol is exported there.

Patch Set 2:

Thanks!

For configure we should add the test for the header:
   <linux/sched/debug.h>
and the function
   sched_show_task()

And we can deprecate the el7 version as a separate patch so this
can be cherry-picked to 2.15 and dropped for 2.17

Patch Set 2:

I pushed a version in two parts, use sched_show_task() and then remove libcfs_debug_dumpstack:

Thanks!

commit.subject: LU-17242 libcfs: use sched_show_task() for thread dumping
commit.message:
LU-17242 libcfs: use sched_show_task() for thread dumping

Use sched_show_task() for thread dumping, since it should be
available on all kernels that Lustre supports. On some kernels,
libcfs_debug_dumpstack() is unable to show the thread stack.
Replacing this function avoid that issue.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Timothy Day <timday@amazon.com>
Change-Id: I8eeb2e23adbe577e83911d3aee4505d2a31b5a25
